---
name: Bug report
about: Something behaves wrong — diagnose the root cause and propose the fix
title: 'Bug: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

<!--
One sentence: what fails, where, and the observable error (paste the message).
Keep the symptom and the cause separate — the two sections below are why our
bugs are reviewable. See issue #50 for the canonical form.
-->

**Root cause:**

<!--
The underlying reason — the layer/file/condition that produces the symptom,
not a restatement of it. State only a cause you can support from the code;
a guessed cause sends the fixer down the wrong path.
-->

**Fix:**

<!--
The concrete change that resolves it — file/function and what to do there.
-->
